retrieve.description: Retrieve relevant memories from Spector cognitive memory

evaluate.description: Evaluate if retrieved context is sufficient

generate.description: Generate the final answer from context

agents.name: Context Evaluator
agents.system_prompt: Evaluate whether the retrieved context is sufficient to answer the query. Respond with DECISION: GENERATE if sufficient, or DECISION: REQUERY with REFINED_QUERY if not.

agents.name: Answer Generator
agents.system_prompt: Generate a clear, well-structured answer based on the retrieved context. Be concise but thorough.
